tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P1] Invert feature flags to enabled-by-default
tasks.description:
Change createFeatureFlag() in apps/server/src/lib/feature-flag.ts to default enabled: true instead of false. Features (Pulse, Relay, Mesh) become active unless explicitly disabled via =false env var or config.

Files to modify:
- apps/server/src/lib/feature-flag.ts — Change initial state to { enabled: true }
- apps/server/src/services/relay-state.ts — Verify defaults true via factory
- apps/server/src/services/mesh/mesh-state.ts — Verify defaults true via factory
- apps/server/src/index.ts — Update feature initialization
- packages/shared/src/config-schema.ts — Verify UserConfigSchema defaults
- packages/cli/src/cli.ts — Update CLI flag defaults (--no-pulse disables)

Tests: apps/server/src/lib/__tests__/feature-flag.test.ts
- createFeatureFlag() defaults to enabled (true)
- setEnabled(false) disables the flag
- Error state tracking works independently
- Env var =false disables, absence means enabled

Acceptance criteria:
- createFeatureFlag() returns enabled: true by default
- All three subsystems active without any env vars
- Setting DORKOS_PULSE_ENABLED=false disables Pulse
- Existing tests pass (update expectations)
- CLI --no-pulse flag disables Pulse

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P1] Create filesystem discovery scanner service
tasks.description:
New server-side service scanning home directory for AI-configured projects, yielding results via async generator for SSE streaming.

File: apps/server/src/services/discovery-scanner.ts (new)

Exports: DiscoveryCandidate interface (path, name, markers[], gitBranch, gitRemote, hasDorkManifest), ScanProgress interface, DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS array, AGENT_MARKERS array, ScanOptions interface (root, maxDepth default 5, timeout default 30000), scanForAgents async generator.

The generator yields three event types: candidate (discovered agent), progress (every 100 dirs), complete (summary with timedOut flag).

Use readdir with withFileTypes: true. Use execFile (not exec) for git commands with 2s timeout. Skip directories matching exclusion patterns. Handle permission errors by skipping inaccessible dirs.

Agent markers to scan for: AGENTS.md, .claude/, .cursor/, .github/copilot, .dork/agent.json.

Exclusion patterns: node_modules, .git, vendor, Library, AppData, .Trash, dist, build, .cache, .npm, .nvm, .local, .cargo, .rustup, go/pkg.

Tests: apps/server/src/services/__tests__/discovery-scanner.test.ts
- Discovers dirs with each marker type
- Skips excluded patterns
- Respects maxDepth
- Handles permission errors
- Returns git branch/remote
- Times out with partial results
- Emits progress events

Acceptance criteria:
- Scanner yields candidate, progress, complete events
- 30-second timeout returns partial results
- Excluded directories skipped
- Permission errors don't crash scanner

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P1] Create discovery SSE route
tasks.description:
Create POST /api/discovery/scan endpoint returning SSE stream from scanner service.

File: apps/server/src/routes/discovery.ts (new)
Create router with POST /scan. Validate request body with Zod (optional root, maxDepth 1-10, timeout 1000-60000). Validate root against directory boundary. Use initSSEStream, sendSSEEvent, endSSEStream from stream-adapter. Iterate scanner async generator and send each event.

File: apps/server/src/index.ts
Mount: app.use('/api/discovery', createDiscoveryRouter())

Tests: apps/server/src/routes/__tests__/discovery.integration.test.ts
- SSE stream emits candidate/progress/complete events
- Returns 400 for invalid body
- Returns 403 for root outside boundary

Acceptance criteria:
- POST /api/discovery/scan returns SSE stream
- Candidates stream progressively
- Boundary validation enforced
- Route mounted in server index.ts

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P1] Create pulse preset system
tasks.description:
Add preset system for Pulse schedules: default presets JSON file, service methods, API endpoint.

Default presets created at ~/.dork/pulse/presets.json on first server start. Four presets: health-check (weekly Monday 8AM, lint/test/typecheck), dependency-audit (weekly Monday 9AM, npm audit), docs-sync (daily 10AM, doc drift check), code-review (weekly Friday 8AM, review recent commits).

File: apps/server/src/services/pulse-store.ts
Add: loadPresets() reads presets.json, ensureDefaultPresets() creates file with defaults if missing.

File: apps/server/src/routes/pulse.ts
Add: GET /presets endpoint returning preset array.

File: apps/server/src/index.ts
Call ensureDefaultPresets() during startup.

Tests: apps/server/src/services/__tests__/pulse-presets.test.ts
- Loads presets from JSON file
- Returns empty array when file doesn't exist
- Handles malformed JSON
- Creates default presets on first start

Acceptance criteria:
- GET /api/pulse/presets returns preset array
- Default presets auto-created on first start
- 4 default presets with meaningful prompts and cron

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P2] Scaffold onboarding FSD module and model hooks
tasks.description:
Create FSD feature module directory and implement three model hooks.

Directory: apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ with ui/, model/, index.ts.

File: model/use-onboarding.ts
Hook returning: state (OnboardingState), isOnboardingComplete, isOnboardingDismissed, shouldShowOnboarding, completeStep(step), skipStep(step), dismiss(), startOnboarding(). Uses TanStack Query with ['config'] query key. Mutation uses PATCH /api/config. shouldShowOnboarding = !complete && !dismissed.

File: model/use-discovery-scan.ts
Hook returning: candidates[], isScanning, progress {scannedDirs, foundAgents}, startScan(options?), error. Creates fetch POST to /api/discovery/scan, reads response as ReadableStream, parses SSE events, accumulates candidates.

File: model/use-pulse-presets.ts
Simple TanStack Query wrapper for GET /api/pulse/presets.

File: index.ts — barrel export.

Tests: model/__tests__/use-onboarding.test.ts
- shouldShowOnboarding states
- completeStep/skipStep/dismiss mutations

Acceptance criteria:
- FSD directory created
- useOnboarding manages state via TanStack Query
- useDiscoveryScan handles SSE from POST endpoint
- usePulsePresets fetches presets
- Barrel export works
tasks.activeForm: Scaffolding onboarding FSD module and hooks

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P2] Create OnboardingFlow container with step navigation
tasks.description:
Full-screen onboarding container managing step navigation, skip controls, animated transitions.

File: apps/client/src/layers/features/onboarding/ui/OnboardingFlow.tsx

Full-screen overlay (fixed inset-0 z-50 bg-background). Step indicator (dots/numbers), current step content, navigation (Back, Skip per-step, Skip all always visible). AnimatePresence for step transitions (slide left/right). Props: onComplete, initialStep?.

Initially renders placeholder content for each step. Actual step components integrated in subsequent tasks.

When last step completes or Skip all: call onComplete(). Skip calls skipStep() from useOnboarding. Skip all calls dismiss().

Acceptance criteria:
- Full-screen overlay renders
- Step indicator shows 3 steps
- Skip advances, Skip all dismisses
- Animated transitions between steps
- initialStep prop works
- Respects prefers-reduced-motion

tasks.subject: [first-time-user-experience] [P3] Create DiscoveryCelebration three-beat sequence
tasks.description:
Three-beat celebration animation after agents discovered.

File: ui/DiscoveryCelebration.tsx

Beat 1 (0-2s): Cards stagger in with motion.div, staggerChildren 0.15, slide up y:20->0, spring damping:20 stiffness:300.
Beat 2 (2-2.5s): fireConfetti() from celebrations/effects.ts, centered 'Found N agents!' with motion.h2 scale 0.8->1.
Beat 3 (2.5-4s): Cards layoutId-transition to topology positions, mini topology fades in with SVG pathLength animation, graph pulses scale 1->1.02->1.

Respects prefers-reduced-motion: skip confetti, instant transitions.
Props: candidates, onComplete (called after Beat 3).

Acceptance criteria:
- Beat 1: staggered entrance
- Beat 2: confetti + announcement
- Beat 3: topology morph
- ~3-4 seconds total
- Reduced motion support
- Calls onComplete after
